mcpServers._comment_filesystem: Lets the agent read/write chosen folders beyond its workspace. Change the path! Needs Node.js (winget install OpenJS.NodeJS).
mcpServers._comment_sqlite: Query a local SQLite database in plain English. Needs uv (winget install astral-sh.uv). Change the db path.

_usage: Copy the entries you want into data/mcp.json (remove _comment keys), fix the paths, restart the app. Keep the server count low: every server's tools are added to the model's context, and an 8B model picks tools best from a short list.
